tactical_shape: Carefully metered possession, controlling the tempo and geometry of the game
Pressed higher after the opening phase and found pockets of space between the lines
standout_players: Frenkie de Jong was measured and stately on the ball
Donyell Malen started in the centre of attack and produced an early powerful shot that forced a save
Virgil van Dijk scored with a finely angled header off the far post
Crysencio Summerville made it 2-1 with a lovely curled left-foot shot after gliding inside
Ryan Gravenberch supplied the ball for Summerville's goal
home_read.momentum: Looked in control for long spells and regained the lead, but were denied late; still appear strong in a wide-open group.

tactical_shape: Set up with attacking midfielders in the wing-back spots and a defensive three
Used high-pressing flurries and responded quickly after conceding
Found most of their threat from the left flank and from right-sided combinations
standout_players: Hajime Moriyasu said the point was very meaningful and that Japan could learn from the Dutch
Zion Suzuki made early saves to deny Malen and another close header
Keito Nakamura had Japan's best chance before half-time and later scored via a deflection off Jan Paul van Hecke
away_read.momentum: Rescued a late draw from a position where they looked flat, suggesting resilience and keeping Group F open.
